name: Risaralda (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the coffee plantations and forests of the Coffee Axis
peace and the snow-capped peaks of the central Andes

description: A green field charged with fourteen white five-pointed stars arranged in two diagonal rows that converge toward the top of the flag.
history: Risaralda was created as a department in 1966 from the southwestern part of Caldas. It lies in Colombia's coffee-growing axis (Eje Cafetero) on the western flank of the central Andes. Its capital is Pereira.

features.symbolism: the fourteen municipalities of the department, arranged in two converging diagonal rows
